/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++11 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/financeSimulationTests.dir/mainTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/financeSimulationTests.dir/__/src/Simulation.cpp.o -o financeSimulationTests  ../src/Agent/libAgent.a ../src/Algorithms/libAlgorithms.a ../src/DataCollector/libDataCollector.a ../src/ExcessDemandCalculator/libExcessDemandCalculator.a ../src/Group/libGroup.a ../src/NeighbourhoodGenerator/libNeighbourhoodGenerator.a ../src/Input/libInput.a ../src/PriceCalculator/libPriceCalculator.a ../src/QuantitiesOfInterest/libQuantitiesOfInterest.a ../src/RandomGenerator/libRandomGenerator.a ../src/StockExchange/libStockExchange.a ../src/Switching/libSwitching.a ../src/VariableContainer/libVariableContainer.a ../src/Version/libVersion.a ../src/Writer/libWriter.a ../libs/tinyxml2/libtinyxml2.a ../libs/googletest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest.a ../libs/googletest/googlemock/libgmock.a -Wl,--whole-archive AgentTest/libAgentTest.a DataCollectorTest/libDataCollectorTest.a GroupTest/libGroupTest.a DummyClasses/libDummyClasses.a ExcessDemandCalculatorTest/libExcessDemandCalculatorTest.a NeighbourhoodGeneratorTest/libNeighbourhoodGeneratorTest.a PriceCalculatorTest/libPriceCalculatorTest.a QuantitiesOfInterestTest/libQuantitiesOfInterestTest.a RandomGeneratorTest/libRandomGeneratorTest.a FullSimulationTest/libFullSimulationTest.a VariableContainerTest/libVariableContainerTest.a WriterTest/libWriterTest.a StockExchangeTest/libStockExchangeTest.a InputTest/libInputTest.a -Wl,-no-whole-archive ../src/Version/libVersion.a ../libs/progressbar/lib/libprogressbar.a -lcurses -lform ../src/Input/libInput.a ../src/DataCollector/libDataCollector.a ../src/Group/libGroup.a ../libs/tinyxml2/libtinyxml2.a
